commands.review_summary:
The PR adds opt-in AI-generated session titles, durable `autoTitle` metadata, session-list/UI display support, and title-model routing/auth updates.

PR surface: Source +342, Tests +270. Total +612 across 24 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR defects: source inspection shows the changed plugin runtime wrapper now forwards credential selectors, and the title generator joins full collected user messages before calling the model. This is a PR review, not a current-main bug reproduction.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A focused repair can remove the plugin-runtime auth exposure and add the missing excerpt cap without deciding the broader feature policy.
